_meta.name: quality_codes
_meta.title: SCADA / OPC point-quality categories
_meta.source: Common OPC-DA / IEC 61850-style quality conventions (documented subset)
_meta.disclaimer: A documented set of common SCADA quality categories used for telemetry validation. It is NOT an exhaustive or vendor-specific quality model; specific historians may expose finer-grained sub-statuses.
